name: Claudia Braun
title: Vergaberechtsexpertin / Juristin
organization_type: Municipal utility company (Eigenbetrieb), subject to Sektorenverordnung

daily_reality.typical_day: Reviews Vergabeunterlagen for legal compliance before publication. Reviews Bewertungsmatrizen for Vergaberecht conformity. Handles Rügen (bidder complaints) and prepares documentation for Vergabekammer proceedings. Advises Fachabteilungen on procurement law.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Manually checking if Bewertungskriterien in the Matrix match the Bekanntmachung wording exactly. Reviewing whether Begründungen are legally sufficient. Writing the same legal caveats into every Vergabevermerk.
daily_reality.weekly_volume: Reviews 3-5 Bewertungsmatrizen for legal compliance, handles 1-2 Rügen per month
critical_constraints: Matrix must be defensible in Vergabekammer

psychology.tech_savviness: low-medium — legal professional, uses tools for research but not tech-forward
psychology.risk_tolerance: extremely low — her job is literally to prevent legal risk
psychology.decision_speed: thorough — reads every word, checks every reference
trust_signals: German legal professional developed or reviewed it
frustration_triggers: tool uses wrong legal framework (VgV when SektVO applies)
no legal references in scoring guidance
AI makes legal claims without sources
tool doesn't flag when Matrix doesn't match Bekanntmachung
delight_triggers: Vergabevermerk template with correct legal structure

first_screen: Not relevant — she enters the tool to review, not to manage. Expects to land directly on the specific evaluation she's asked to review.
must_have: Side-by-side view: Bekanntmachung criteria vs. Bewertungsmatrix (check consistency)
Begründung quality check (is it legally sufficient?)
deal_breakers: AI generates legal statements without references
Tool generates Vergabevermerk without legal structure
nice_to_have: Link to Beck-Online for relevant court decisions
Risk score for each evaluation decision (litigation likelihood)
History of similar evaluations and their outcomes
expectations.current_pain_level: 6/10 — process is manual but she's used to it; value is in reducing errors and legal risk
